title_cn: 报告称艾伯维 (AbbVie) 即将以 110 亿美元收购 Apogee Therapeutics
summary: AbbVie Inc. is nearing a deal to buy Apogee Therapeutics Inc. for almost $11 billion to bolster the drug giant’s anti-inflammatory portfolio, according to a Financial Times report.

title: Does Everlane’s Sale to Shein Mark the End of Millennial Optimism?
title_cn: Everlane 出售给 Shein 是否标志着千禧一代乐观主义的终结？

title: UnitedHealth’s $3 Billion AI Push Has Bots Calling Doctors
title_cn: UnitedHealth 斥资 30 亿美元推动 AI 机器人呼叫医生
summary: At UnitedHealth Group Inc., artificial intelligence reads aloud summaries of medical charts as nurses drive to patients’ homes. It listens to millions of customer calls to find the causes of complaints. One trial even has AI agents calling doctors’ offices to schedule appointments for patients.

title: 米イラン和平合意、日銀1％に利上げ、東証終値で初の7万円台に─1週間のニュース5選
title_cn: 美伊和平协议、日本央行加息至1%、东京证券交易所收盘价首次触及7万日元水平——本周5条新闻
summary: 国際政治もマーケットも新たな局面へ踏み出した1週間。五つのニュースを厳選して振り返ります。

title: Latin American FX Edge Higher With Markets in ‘Holding Pattern’
title_cn: 拉丁美洲外汇走高，市场处于“持有格局”
summary: Most Latin American currencies advanced in a quiet session for global markets amid holidays in the US and parts of Asia, leaving assets in a holding pattern as traders await fresh news out of the Middle East.

title: Stocks Stall as Iran Nuclear Talks Hit Early Snag: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于伊朗核谈判遇到早期障碍，股市陷入停滞：市场结束
summary: Global stocks are ending a strong week on a cautious note as relief over an interim peace deal between the US and Iran gave way to a focus on the challenges of securing a lasting agreement.

title: Gold Set for Weekly Loss on Hawkish Fed and Peace Deal Jitters
title_cn: 由于鹰派美联储和和平协议的紧张情绪，金价将每周下跌
summary: Gold dropped, heading for a third weekly loss as traders weighed delays in negotiations over a permanent Middle East peace deal and the outlook for US interest rates.

title: Starbucks Cuts UK, Hong Kong Office Jobs in Restructuring Effort
title_cn: 星巴克削减英国和香港办事处职位以进行重组
summary: Starbucks Corp. laid off corporate workers in the London and Hong Kong hubs that oversee parts of its international business, as the coffee chain gives third-party licensees greater latitude to run its stores outside of North America.

title: ‘Take Risk’: Canada Regulator Cuts Bank Capital Level to Boost Lending
title_cn: “承担风险”：加拿大监管机构削减银行资本水平以增加放贷
summary: Canada’s financial regulator lowered capital requirements for the country’s largest banks for the first time in three years, giving them the flexibility to lend more to support a domestic push for defense spending, infrastructure and artificial intelligence.

title: Canada Imposes Temporary 10% Tariff on Canned Vegetables
title_cn: 加拿大对罐装蔬菜征收10%临时关税
summary: Canada applied a 10% import tax on imports of canned vegetables to protect domestic growers and food processors, the Department of Finance said in a statement Friday.

title: Oil Gains as Iran War Negotiations Falter, Tanker Movements Slow
title_cn: 伊朗战争谈判步履蹒跚、油轮运输缓慢，油价上涨
summary: Oil gained on Friday as planned negotiations between the US and Iran were delayed and tanker traffic out of the Persian Gulf slowed.

title: First Quantum Deemed Broadly Compliant at Panama Copper Mine
title_cn: 巴拿马铜矿第一个被认为广泛合规的量子
summary: Panama moved closer to deciding whether First Quantum Minerals Ltd. can reopen a giant copper mine after receiving a long-awaited audit that found the project met most of its environmental, legal, fiscal and operational obligations.

title: Global Stocks End Strong Week on Cautious Note
title_cn: 全球股市以谨慎态度结束强劲的一周
summary:
Global stocks are ending a strong week on a cautious note as relief over an interim peace deal between the US and Iran gave way to a focus on the challenges of securing a lasting agreement.
Anneka Treon, Global Head of Private Banking, Wealth Management, and Investments at ING Investments, discusses her outlook for Europe, client concerns, and the broader macro picture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, Iran Delay Nuclear Talks as Lebanon Clashes Worsen
title_cn: 黎巴嫩冲突加剧，美国和伊朗推迟核谈判
summary:
Iran delayed the start of negotiations over a permanent peace deal with the US after fighting intensified in southern Lebanon, a potential setback to Donald Trump’s efforts to end the war and curb Tehran’s nuclear program.
Ambassador Puneet Talwar, Principal at Talwar Global Strategies and former US Ambassador to Morocco, discusses the US, Iran interim deal and what he expects to see from negotiations in the coming days.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Stock Regulator Lets Firms Buy Back Shares From Market
title_cn: 印度股票监管机构允许企业从市场回购股票
summary: India’s securities regulator will reintroduce open-market buybacks for companies, a move that could bolster shares prices as local equities have lagged global peers.

title: Aspen Disruption Triggers South Africa Contraceptive Shortage
title_cn: 阿斯彭中断引发南非避孕药具短缺
summary: A disruption at Aspen Pharmacare Holdings Ltd.’s manufacturing facilities has led to shortages of oral contraceptives across South Africa, according to the health department and a local pharmacy chain.

title: Ghana Is Weighing Local Control of Gold Fields’ Biggest Mine
title_cn: 加纳正在考虑对金矿最大的矿山实行地方控制
summary: Ghana is considering transferring control of Gold Fields Ltd.’s Tarkwa mine to local firms when its leases expire in April, part of a push to increase control of its gold industry and benefit more from high bullion prices. The company’s shares plunged.

title: Vitol Won Emergency Zambia Fuel Deal That Drew IMF Scrutiny
title_cn: 维多赢得了引起国际货币基金组织审查的赞比亚紧急燃料协议
summary: Vitol Group is supplying diesel to Zambia via exclusive access to a pipeline that lasts through September, in an emergency arrangement the International Monetary Fund has urged authorities to end.

title: UK Bonds Fall as Burnham Win Leaves Markets Speculating on Risks
title_cn: 伯纳姆获胜让市场猜测风险，英国债券下跌
summary: The UK’s government bonds fell after Andy Burnham’s victory in a special election renewed political uncertainty, prompting investors to demand a higher premium to hold the country’s debt.

title: Absa to Lift Kenya Unit Stake to 85% in $239 Million Tender
title_cn: Absa 将通过 2.39 亿美元的投标将肯尼亚单位股权提升至 85%
summary: South Africa’s Absa Group Ltd. plans to raise its stake in its Kenyan unit to 85% through a $238.7 million tender offer, underscoring its confidence in East Africa’s growth prospects.

title: Abu Dhabi’s $21 Billion Holding Firm Gets First ‘Buy’ Rating
title_cn: 阿布扎比价值 210 亿美元的控股公司首次获得“买入”评级
summary: One of Abu Dhabi’s newest investing behemoths, 2PointZero PJSC, got its first research rating on Friday, providing rare insight into one of the emirate’s largest listed holding companies.

title: Bain Capital CLO Tranche Defaults in Post-2008 First for Europe
title_cn: 贝恩资本 CLO 部分违约为 2008 年后欧洲首例
summary: Part of a European collateralized loan obligation managed by Bain Capital has failed to repay investors in full, the first such default since an overhaul of the asset-backed securities more than a decade ago.

title: Elliott, SVP Buy Braskem Debt Amid Restructuring Talks
title_cn: Elliott 高级副总裁在重组谈判中购买 Braskem 债务
summary: Elliott Investment Management LP and Strategic Value Partners have recently bought debt of Braskem SA, the Brazilian petrochemical producer rushing to get creditors to agree to a restructuring plan, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Magna Founder Stronach Found Guilty of Sexual Assault, CBC Says
title_cn: 加拿大广播公司称，麦格纳创始人斯特罗纳克被判犯有性侵犯罪
summary: The founder of Canadian automotive parts firm Magna International Inc. was found guilty of one count of sexual assault and one count of indecent assault in a Toronto courtroom Friday, the Canadian Broadcasting Corp. reported.

title: Alamos Gold Shares Plunge on Output Cut After Earthquake at Mine
title_cn: 阿拉莫斯金矿地震后减产，股价暴跌
summary: Alamos Gold Inc. shares fell the most since 2020 after the Canadian company cut second-quarter production guidance following earthquakes that damaged a key mine.

title: Europe Gas Storages Get Little Reprieve From Iran Peace Deal
title_cn: 欧洲储气库几乎没有从伊朗和平协议中得到缓解
summary: European natural gas prices have mostly fallen since a US-Iran peace accord started to take shape this week, but the drop has done little to improve the economics of storing fuel for winter as analysts continue to expect a tight market.

title: Russia Sells Stake in Seized Top Gold Miner for $1.3 Billion
title_cn: 俄罗斯以 13 亿美元出售被扣押的顶级金矿商的股份
summary: Russia sold a top gold miner that it seized from a billionaire last year, though only after multiple attempts and for about half the price it originally sought.

title: Ambani’s Jio Could Be India’s Biggest IPO
title_cn: 安巴尼的 Jio 可能成为印度最大的 IPO
summary: Jio Platforms is gearing up for what could become India’s biggest IPO ever. The telecom giant serves nearly 525 million subscribers and counts Meta, Alphabet and KKR among its backers. Now, Ambani’s digital crown jewel is preparing for its next chapter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Asian Oil Buyers Brace for Flood of Crude From Persian Gulf
title_cn: 亚洲石油买家为波斯湾原油大量涌入做好准备
summary: The biggest customers for Middle Eastern supplies are under pressure to take cargoes or face penalties.

title: Ambani’s Jio Platforms Files For Long-Awaited India IPO
title_cn: 安巴尼的 Jio 平台提交期待已久的印度 IPO 申请
summary: Jio Platforms Ltd., a crown jewel of billionaire Mukesh Ambani’s oil-to-retail conglomerate, filed draft listing documents on Friday, starting the process of unlocking shareholder value in one of India’s most-anticipated initial public offerings.

title: Andy Burnham Win Puts UK PM Under Pressure & US-Iran Talks Called Off | The Pulse 6/19/2026
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆·温 (Andy Burnham Win) 让英国首相面临压力，美伊会谈被取消脉搏 2026 年 6 月 19 日
summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Mark Haefele, UBS Global Wealth Management, CIO; Laurel Rapp, Chatham House, US and North America Programme Director; Jane Green, University of Oxford, Politics Professor. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Tells Axios He Doesn’t See Anthropic as US Security Threat
title_cn: 特朗普告诉 Axios 他不认为人类是美国的安全威胁
summary: President Donald Trump said he doesn’t view Anthropic PBC as a national-security threat, days after his administration took steps to cut off foreign access to the tech company’s most advanced artificial intelligence models.

title: Nobel Winner John Jumper to Leave Google DeepMind for Anthropic
title_cn: 诺贝尔奖获得者 John Jumper 离开 Google DeepMind 加盟 Anthropic
summary: Google DeepMind Vice President John Jumper, who won the 2024 Nobel Prize in chemistry for his work on artificial intelligence, is leaving the company to join Anthropic PBC.

title: Signal’s Whittaker on Big Tech’s Privacy Threat
title_cn: Signal 的 Whittaker 谈大型科技公司的隐私威胁
summary:
"Three companies... can make decisions that fundamentally harm our collective cybersecurity."

Signal President Meredith Whittaker tells Mishal Husain why she believes AI and big tech pose a major threat to privacy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Oura Ring 5 Makes a Strong Case to First-Time Buyers
title_cn: Oura Ring 5 为首次购买者提供了强有力的支持
summary: People who already own one of the company’s older models have less of a reason to upgrade to the $399 device.

title: AutoForm’s Debt Rejig Highlights Revived Appetite for Software
title_cn: AutoForm 的债务重组凸显了软件需求的复苏
summary: Investors in European collateralized loan obligations piled into AutoForm’s latest deal, the first test of demand for junk-debt borrowers in the software sector since a selloff earlier this year.

title: Lutnick’s Anthropic Crackdown Claims New Power Over AI Models
title_cn: 卢特尼克的人为镇压声称人工智能模型拥有新的力量
summary: The Trump administration’s push to rein in Anthropic PBC, outlined in a recent Commerce Department order, relies on an unprecedented use of export control laws and raises legal questions about whether the US can dictate who can access artificial intelligence systems.

title: EU Tech Chief Virkkunen on AI, Sovereignty, US
title_cn: 欧盟技术主管 Virkkunen 是人工智能、主权、美国
summary: Henna Virkkunen, EU's top technology official, & Executive Vice President sat down with Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie on the sidelines of VivaTech in Paris to discuss EU AI regulation, cybersecurity risks, Europe's technological sovereignty, and reducing reliance on non-European technology providers in critical sectors. This interview occurred on Wednesday, June 17. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Scatec Says Egypt Solar Project Can Save $400 Million Over LNG
title_cn: Scatec表示埃及太阳能项目可比液化天然气节省4亿美元
summary: Scatec ASA’s Obelisk solar and battery storage project in Egypt can save the country as much as $400 million a year in liquefied natural gas imports, according to Chief Executive Officer Terje Pilskog.

title: Ambani’s Jio Weighs India Satellite Network to Rival Starlink
title_cn: 安巴尼 (Ambani) 的 Jio 将印度卫星网络与竞争对手星链 (Starlink) 进行比较
summary: Billionaire Mukesh Ambani-controlled Jio Platforms Ltd. is weighing plans to build its own satellite constellation, as it seeks to cement control over the nation’s communications infrastructure while Elon Musk’s Starlink faces hurdles.

title: US Tells ASML It’s Concerned China May Have Top Chip Tool
title_cn: 美国告诉ASML，它担心中国可能拥有顶级芯片工具
summary: Dutch chip-equipment giant ASML Holding NV is contending with its biggest challenge yet under the Trump administration: In a series of recent meetings, Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick outlined concerns to ASML’s senior leaders that one of its top-of-the-line machines may have made its way into China, in violation of US-led export restrictions.

title: Chipmakers Renew Nerdy Performance Tussle That Nvidia’s Dominance Had Quashed
title_cn: 芯片制造商重新燃起性能之争，英伟达的统治地位已被打破
summary: With CPUs back in the spotlight, so too is the PR fight over benchmarks

title: Turkish Fintech Firm Midas Plans Expansion Into Payment Systems
title_cn: 土耳其金融科技公司 Midas 计划扩展到支付系统
summary: Turkish financial technologies firm Midas has applied to the central bank for an electronic money institution license as it seeks to launch digital consumer payments products.

title: UK Fintech Starling Shrinks Board as McPike Cements Control
title_cn: 英国金融科技 Starling 缩减董事会规模，麦克派克水泥控制公司 (McPike Cements Control)
summary: Starling Bank Ltd. is streamlining its board in light of a number of departures, a move that increases the sway of UK digital bank’s largest shareholder.

title: Microsoft, Amazon Cloud Services Face Tough EU Antitrust Law
title_cn: 微软、亚马逊云服务面临严厉的欧盟反垄断法
summary: Microsoft Corp.’s Azure and Amazon Web Services are on a collision course with the European Union’s tough digital competition rulebook, after an initial probe into their power over the cloud.

title: Siemens Sees Industrial App Store Sales Doubling in Tech Push
title_cn: 西门子看到工业应用商店销售额在技术推动下翻了一番
summary: Siemens AG expects revenue from its online store to more than double this year, though the maker of industrial software and trains is stopping short of disclosing concrete figures that would track its progress of turning into a tech-led company.

title: Anthropic's Co-Founder and Top Economist on Doing Research at the AI Frontier | Odd Lots
title_cn: Anthropic 联合创始人兼顶级经济学家谈人工智能前沿研究 |零股
summary: There’s a lot to unpack with AI right now — everything from its potential impacts on the labor market and society to more extreme questions about existential risk. Anthropic, which builds frontier models like Mythos, Fable, and Claude, is actively grappling with these issues, including whether governments should limit AI development. Just last week, the Trump administration forced Anthropic to block foreign access to its two leading models. In this episode, we speak with Jack Clark (co-founder and head of public benefit) and Peter McCrory (head of economics) about how Anthropic approaches safety and economic risks. We talk about Anthropic’s preparations for recursive self-improvement, the engineers it's hiring now, and why Jack left Bloomberg to enter the early AI industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fujikura Shares Surge 16% as Outlook Hike Calms Market Jitters
title_cn: 展望上调平息市场不安，藤仓股价飙升 16%
summary: Japanese fiber-optic cablemaker Fujikura Ltd.’s shares gained 16% to their daily limit after the firm unexpectedly raised its profit guidance above market estimates.

title: Prosus Expects Surge in Profits on E-Commerce, Tencent Growth
title_cn: Prosus 预计电子商务和腾讯的增长将带来利润激增
summary: Prosus NV expects core earnings to surge as much as 28% in the year ended March 31st on the back of its growing e-commerce business and an increase in the value of the stake it owns in China’s Tencent.

title: Indian Software Stocks Tumble After Accenture Warns on Growth
title_cn: 埃森哲警告增长后印度软件股暴跌
summary: Shares of Indian software firms tumbled on Friday, joining a global selloff in tech stocks after Accenture Plc forecast slower revenue growth, deepening concerns over a sector that has shed nearly 30% of its market value this year.

title: Traders’ Latest AI-Related Play Is a Struggling Car Parts Stock
title_cn: 交易员最新的人工智能相关策略是陷入困境的汽车零部件股
summary: Investors looking for the stock market’s next artificial intelligence winner have honed in on embattled French car parts maker Valeo SE.

title: Early Users of Anthropic Mythos Still Have Access After US Order
title_cn: 在美国下令后，人择神话的早期用户仍然可以访问
summary: Some firms chosen early on by Anthropic PBC to test the Mythos AI model ahead of a wider release have preserved their access to a preview of the system, despite a US government order that led to the total shutdown of other versions.

title: US Tells ASML China May Have Top Chip Tool
title_cn: 美国告诉ASML中国可能拥有顶级芯片工具
summary: ASML Holding NV, the Dutch chip-equipment giant, is grappling with a major challenge after US  Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick warned its leaders that one of the company’s  advanced lithography machines may have reached China, potentially violating US export restrictions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Says Canada’s Data Law Changes Fail to Ease Concerns
title_cn: 谷歌称加拿大数据法修改未能缓解担忧
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google said Canada’s changes to a proposed law that would help police obtain citizen data from private companies don’t resolve many of its concerns.

title: Fed Rate-Hike Bets Fuel Equities Rally | The Close 6/18/2026
title_cn: 美联储加息押注推动股市上涨收盘价 2026 年 6 月 18 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are GenTrust Head of NY Office, Senior Client Advisor Mimi Duff, Principal Venture Partners Founder & Managing Partner Songyee Yoon, Wedbush SVP of Equity Research Alicia Reese, Goldman Sachs Northeast Region Head Nicole Pullen Ross, Interactive Brokers Chief Strategist Steve Sosnick, JP Morgan Asset Management CEO George Gatch, Chef & Restauranteur Kwame Onwuachi, Former Lululemon CIO Julie Averill, Candle Media Founder & Co-CEO Kevin Mayer. & SevenRooms Co-Founder & CEO Joel Montaniel. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Criticizes EU Proposal for Satellite Spectrum Tender
title_cn: SpaceX 批评欧盟卫星频谱招标提案
summary: SpaceX criticized the European Union’s plans for the distribution of satellite spectrum, a key element in the growth plans for the Elon Musk-led company’s Starlink service following its record-setting initial public offering.

title: SevenRooms CEO on New Reservation Organizing Platform
title_cn: SevenRooms 首席执行官谈新的预订组织平台
summary: Joel Montaniel, Co-Founder and CEO of SevenRooms, discussed the company's new platform, Channel Connect, which aims to simplify reservation management for restaurants by consolidating bookings from multiple channels into a single system. Unlike the hotel industry, where centralized booking systems are common, restaurants currently manage reservations across various apps and platforms, often using multiple devices, creating operational challenges. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Candle’s Mayer Says Ad-Backed Streaming ‘Snuck Up’ on Industry
title_cn: Candle 的梅耶尔表示，广告支持的流媒体“偷偷”进入了行业
summary: Fox Corp.’s $22 billion acquisition of Roku Inc. illustrates how free-to-watch, ad-supported streaming services are becoming a major force in the entertainment industry, according to Candle Media Inc. co-Chief Executive Officer Kevin Mayer.

title: Companies Move to Secure Data as AI Increases Security Risks
title_cn: 随着人工智能增加安全风险，公司转向保护数据
summary:
Michael Cardaci, CEO of FedHIVE said that the government is moving 'faster than its ever moved before' to secure data and make sure that US computing companies are compliant in case of national security risks as AI use ramps up. 
Cardaci said that the US government is focused on keeping US technology inside of its borders as the race for global AI dominance heats up.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Judge Says DOJ Can Hand Biden Recordings to Heritage Foundation
title_cn: 法官称司法部可以将拜登录音交给传统基金会
summary: A federal judge in Washington denied former President Joe Biden’s request to block the Justice Department from turning over tapes and transcripts of interviews he privately recorded almost a decade ago to a conservative advocacy group, but will temporarily bar the release while he appeals.

title: DOJ Rejects Judge Request to Certify $1.8 Billion Fund Nixed
title_cn: 美国司法部拒绝法官要求证明 18 亿美元基金被取消的请求
summary: The Justice Department rebuffed a US judge’s invitation for top officials to submit a signed statement under oath that a $1.8 billion fund for what the administration described as victims of political “weaponization” will not happen.

title: US-Iran Nuclear Talks Stall Over Lebanon Before They Begin
title_cn: 美伊核谈判在开始前因黎巴嫩问题陷入僵局
summary: Iran delayed the start of negotiations over a permanent peace deal with the US after fighting intensified in southern Lebanon, a potential setback to Donald Trump’s efforts to end the war and curb Tehran’s nuclear program.

title: Trump Displays Refitted Qatar-Gifted Jet to Be Air Force One
title_cn: 特朗普展示卡塔尔赠送的改装喷气式飞机“空军一号”
summary: President Donald Trump on Friday unveiled the Boeing Co. 747-8 that will serve as the new US presidential jet, proclaiming the gifted plane from the Qatari government “virtually double the size” of the previous model.

title: Polish President Strips Zelenskyy of Top State Honor Amid Row
title_cn: 波兰总统在争吵中剥夺泽伦斯基的最高国家荣誉
summary: Poland’s President Karol Nawrocki stripped his Ukrainian counterpart Volodymyr Zelenskyy of the country’s highest state honor amid a row about commemorating fighters responsible for a World War II massacre.

title: Trump Says Meloni Begged for a Photo; She Says He Made It Up
title_cn: 特朗普称梅洛尼请求合影；她说他编造的
summary: Donald Trump said Italian Premier Giorgia Meloni “begged” him for a joint photo at this week’s Group of Seven summit in France. She called the claim “fully made up.” The US president snapped back that he no longer wants her as a fan.

title: Hungarian Judges Deal Blow to President’s Bid to Keep Office
title_cn: 匈牙利法官对总统连任的努力造成打击
summary: Hungary’s top court shelved President Tamas Sulyok’s petition that had sought to prevent his ouster, potentially lending momentum to the freshly elected prime minister’s bid to remove the head of state from office.

title: Starmer Braces for Cabinet Showdown With Burnham Ready to Pounce
title_cn: 斯塔默为内阁摊牌做好准备，伯纳姆准备突袭
summary: A clear majority of Keir Starmer’s cabinet believe it’s now inevitable Andy Burnham’s will take over as prime minister, according to people familiar with the thinking of more than 15 cabinet ministers, who spoke to Bloomberg on condition of anonymity on Friday.

title: Ukraine’s Biggest Strike on Moscow Spurs Fuel Shortage Fears
title_cn: 乌克兰对莫斯科最大规模的罢工引发了燃料短缺的担忧
summary: After the shock of Ukraine’s biggest drone attack on the Russian capital, Muscovites face rising gasoline prices and possible fuel shortages.

title: Iran Floats ‘Insurance Fees’ and Asserts Control Over Hormuz
title_cn: 伊朗浮动“保险费”并声称控制霍尔木兹
summary: Iran sought to assert control over the Strait of Hormuz by saying that ships need its permission and mandatory insurance in order to cross, even as the US said that 20 ships had quietly sailed through overnight via a route along Oman’s coast.

title: Merz Pushes Back on US Drug Probe, Citing EU Trade Pact
title_cn: 默兹以欧盟贸易协定为由反击美国毒品调查
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz said he expects the US to stand by its trade commitments with Europe after Donald Trump’s administration launched a tariff investigation into Germany’s drug pricing.

title: Burnham By-Election Win Paves Way For Starmer Ouster
title_cn: 伯纳姆补选胜利为斯塔默下台铺平道路
summary:
Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham won a decisive victory for the ruling Labour Party that delivers him a seat in Parliament and, with it, a pathway to challenge UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer for his job. 
Bloomberg UK Politics Reporter James Woolcock discusses what he expects to see from a potential leadership showdown in the UK. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Germany’s Merz Seeks Currency Talks to Fix Undervalued Yuan
title_cn: 德国默茨寻求货币谈判以解决人民币被低估的问题
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz called for international talks about exchange rates as part of the European Union’s resolve to address its deepening trade deficit with China.

title: Trump’s Messaging on Iran Deal Aims to Rebut Claims the US Lost
title_cn: 特朗普关于伊朗协议的信息旨在反驳美国失败的说法
summary: The US and Iran may have halted their conflict for now, but the messaging war has only just begun.

title: Is Andy Burnham The UK’s Next Prime Minister?
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆是英国下一任首相吗？
summary: Andy Burnham’s victory over Reform has intensified questions about Keir Starmer’s future. Bloomberg Opinion columnist Rosa Prince explains why Labour could soon face a leadership contest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Farage’s National Ambitions Take Hit as Voters Flock to Burnham
title_cn: 选民涌向伯纳姆，法拉奇的国家雄心受到打击
summary: The emphatic defeat suffered by Nigel Farage’s Reform party in Thursday’s Makerfield by-election laid bare political handicaps that threaten his ambition to reach 10 Downing Street.

title: Two Men Jailed Over Arson Attacks That Targeted Keir Starmer
title_cn: 两名男子因针对凯尔·斯塔默的纵火袭击而入狱
summary: Two men have been handed prison sentences by a London court for a series of arson attacks on a car and property linked to UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer.

title: Ankara Is Fresh Paint and Roses in Facelift Ahead of NATO Summit
title_cn: 安卡拉在北约峰会前焕然一新
summary: Turkey, ahead of a NATO summit in Ankara next month, is not only raising a security force larger than many alliance members’ militaries but also giving the Turkish capital a cosmetic makeover.

title: Democrats Audition to Lead the Party Back in 2028
title_cn: 民主党试镜 2028 年重新领导该党
summary: The party’s next standard bearer will campaign to turn the page on Trump

title: South African Minister Urges Police to Find Xenophobic Agitators
title_cn: 南非部长敦促警方寻找仇外煽动者
summary: South Africa’s public works and infrastructure minister called on law enforcement agencies to act against those responsible for violence against migrants, warning that the attacks are tarnishing the country’s international reputation.

title: Burnham Found a Way Back to Westminster by Rebelling Against It
title_cn: 伯纳姆通过反抗找到了返回威斯敏斯特的方法
summary: Andy Burnham’s triumphant return to the House of Commons shows Labour colleagues he can turn the party’s fortunes around in a way that others can’t.

title: Burnham: Need an Economy That 'Works for Everybody'
title_cn: 伯纳姆：需要一个“适合所有人”的经济
summary: Labour's Andy Burnham says there is a need to make "life more affordable." He speaks at a rally in Makerfield on Friday, after his decisive victory in the by-election which secured him 54.8% of the vote. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Leaders Warn on China Imbalances But Respond Cautiously
title_cn: 欧盟领导人对中国失衡发出警告但反应谨慎
summary: European Union leaders sought to strike a balance between addressing deepening trade imbalances with China while not provoking a damaging conflict with the world’s No. 2 economy.

title: Burnham Paves Way to Oust Starmer as UK PM Says He’ll Dig In
title_cn: 伯纳姆为罢免斯塔默铺平道路，英国首相表示他将继续努力
summary: Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham won a decisive victory for the ruling Labour Party that delivers him a seat in Parliament and, with it, a pathway to challenge UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer for his job.

title: Burnham Says 'This Is the Moment' for Change in UK
title_cn: 伯纳姆表示英国“现在是变革的时刻”
summary: "We have an opportunity to turn the tide," Labour Party's Andy Burnham says at a rally in Makerfield. He speaks after a decisive victory in the by-election which secured him 54.8% of the vote. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What It Would Take for Labour to Replace Keir Starmer
title_cn: 工党需要什么才能取代凯尔·斯塔默
summary: Andy Burnham’s return to the House of Commons means UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer is facing an unprecedented challenge to his leadership from within his Labour Party.

title: Czech Billionaire Premier Feuds With Central Bank Over Rate Hike
title_cn: 捷克亿万富翁总理因加息与央行发生争执
summary: The Czech prime minister heightened his public criticism of the central bank’s tight monetary policy, saying its latest move to raise interest rates will hurt the economy.

title: De la Espriella y Cepeda refuerzan vigilancia de mesas en las elecciones de Colombia
title_cn: De la Espriella 和 Cepeda 加强了对哥伦比亚选举表的监视
summary: A pocos días de la elección en Colombia, ambos candidatos refuerzan sus redes de testigos para supervisar el proceso, denunciar irregularidades y proteger los resultados del domingo. (Source: Bloomberg)
